Staff Weeks Outgoing

You can search for staff weeks around Europe on

Staff Mobility Online Platform

.

This platform, organized by IMOTION, aims to centralize information about staff training events organized in Europe to provide easy access.

The platform will help Higher Education Institutions promote staff training events; it will help those organizing job shadowing to find appropriate people and also enable staff to find the proper training or job shadowing they are looking for.

Quick Search

Through this form, you can access news, announcements, faculties and departments, base scores, our academic staff and administrative personnel, and their internal phone numbers.
